```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r 01_install, echo=FALSE, message=TRUE}

pkgs <- c("arrow","dplyr","tidyr","ggplot2","stringr",
          "purrr","lubridate","janitor","forcats","broom")
new <- setdiff(pkgs, rownames(installed.packages()))
if (length(new)) install.packages(new, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
```

```{r 02_load, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(arrow);    library(dplyr);   library(tidyr);  library(ggplot2)
library(stringr);  library(purrr);   library(lubridate)
library(janitor);  library(forcats)
```

```{r}
panel <- read_parquet("data_final/panel_cbsa_q.parquet")
dim(panel); head(panel)
```

```{r 63_time_series, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=4}

pick_col <- function(df, candidates, required = FALSE) {
  f <- intersect(candidates, names(df))
  if (length(f)) return(f[1])
  if (required) stop(paste("Missing required column. Tried:", paste(candidates, collapse=", ")))
  NA_character_
}
make_quarter <- function(year, qnum) {
  if (is.factor(year)) year <- as.character(year)
  if (is.factor(qnum)) qnum <- as.character(qnum)
  year <- as.integer(year)
  qnum <- as.integer(qnum)
  as.Date(paste0(year, "-", (qnum - 1) * 3 + 1, "-01"))
}


col_region  <- pick_col(panel, c("cbsa","cbsa_code","cbsa_fips","cbsa_id","region","msa","cz"), TRUE)
col_rname   <- pick_col(panel, c("cbsa_name","region_name","msa_name","name"))
col_year    <- pick_col(panel, c("year","yr"), TRUE)
col_qnum    <- pick_col(panel, c("quarter","qtr","quarter_number"), TRUE)


col_pop_y   <- pick_col(panel, c("pop_22_27","pop_young","pop_ba_22_27","pop_18_29","young_pop"))
col_u_ba    <- pick_col(panel, c("u_22_27_ba","u_ba_22_27","unemp_ba_22_27","urate_ba_22_27","u_ba"))
col_u_all   <- pick_col(panel, c("u_all","unemp_all","urate_all","u_overall"))
col_d_post  <- pick_col(panel, c("postings_index","demand_post_rt","post_per_young","postings_rt","postings_ba_rt","demand_post","ba_postings_rate"))
col_s_flow  <- pick_col(panel, c("flow_ba","supply_flow_rt","ba_flow_rt","supply_flow","grad_flow_rt"))


DFw <- panel %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    .region = .data[[col_region]],
    .rname  = if (!is.na(col_rname)) .data[[col_rname]] else as.character(.data[[col_region]]),
    .quarter = make_quarter(.data[[col_year]], .data[[col_qnum]]),
    u_ba   = if (!is.na(col_u_ba))  as.numeric(.data[[col_u_ba]])  else NA_real_,
    u_all  = if (!is.na(col_u_all)) as.numeric(.data[[col_u_all]]) else NA_real_,
    d_post = if (!is.na(col_d_post)) as.numeric(.data[[col_d_post]]) else NA_real_,
    s_flow = if (!is.na(col_s_flow)) as.numeric(.data[[col_s_flow]]) else NA_real_,
    pop_y  = if (!is.na(col_pop_y))  as.numeric(.data[[col_pop_y]]) else NA_real_
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(.region, .rname, .quarter, u_ba, u_all, d_post, s_flow, pop_y) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(.region, .quarter)


weight_available <- any(!is.na(DFw$pop_y))
agg_fun <- function(x, w) if (weight_available) stats::weighted.mean(x, w, na.rm = TRUE) else mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)

nat_ts <- DFw %>%
  dplyr::group_by(.quarter) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    u_ba_nat  = agg_fun(u_ba,  pop_y),
    u_all_nat = agg_fun(u_all, pop_y),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(
  ggplot(nat_ts, aes(.quarter)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = u_ba_nat)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = u_all_nat), linetype = 2) +
    labs(title = "National Unemployment: BA 22â€“27 vs All",
         x = "Quarter", y = "Unemployment rate",
         caption = if (weight_available) "Population-weighted by young pop" else "Unweighted mean across regions")
)


quartile_by <- function(v) {
  vv <- v[is.finite(v)]
  if (length(unique(vv)) < 2) return(factor(rep("All regions", length(v)), levels = "All regions"))
  cut(v, breaks = quantile(v, c(0,.25,.5,.75,1), na.rm = TRUE),
      include.lowest = TRUE, labels = c("Q1 (Low)","Q2","Q3","Q4 (High)"))
}

reg_means <- DFw %>%
  dplyr::group_by(.region) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(d_post_mean = mean(d_post, na.rm = TRUE),
                   s_flow_mean = mean(s_flow, na.rm = TRUE),
                   .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(d_post_q = quartile_by(d_post_mean),
                s_flow_q = quartile_by(s_flow_mean))

DFq <- DFw %>% dplyr::left_join(reg_means %>% dplyr::select(.region, d_post_q, s_flow_q), by = ".region")

series_by_q <- function(df, qvar, yvar) {
  df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.quarter, .data[[qvar]]) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(val = agg_fun(.data[[yvar]], pop_y), .groups = "drop")
}


ts_ba_d  <- series_by_q(DFq, "d_post_q", "u_ba")
ts_all_d <- series_by_q(DFq, "d_post_q", "u_all")

print(
  ggplot(ts_ba_d, aes(.quarter, val, color = d_post_q)) +
    geom_line() +
    labs(title = "U(BA 22â€“27) by Demand (Postings) Quartile",
         x = "Quarter", y = "Unemployment rate", color = "Demand quartile")
)
print(
  ggplot(ts_all_d, aes(.quarter, val, color = d_post_q)) +
    geom_line() +
    labs(title = "U(All) by Demand (Postings) Quartile",
         x = "Quarter", y = "Unemployment rate", color = "Demand quartile")
)


ts_ba_s  <- series_by_q(DFq, "s_flow_q", "u_ba")
ts_all_s <- series_by_q(DFq, "s_flow_q", "u_all")

print(
  ggplot(ts_ba_s, aes(.quarter, val, color = s_flow_q)) +
    geom_line() +
    labs(title = "U(BA 22â€“27) by Supply Flow Quartile",
         x = "Quarter", y = "Unemployment rate", color = "Supply quartile")
)
print(
  ggplot(ts_all_s, aes(.quarter, val, color = s_flow_q)) +
    geom_line() +
    labs(title = "U(All) by Supply Flow Quartile",
         x = "Quarter", y = "Unemployment rate", color = "Supply quartile")
)
```

```{r 68_data_dictionary, message=FALSE}

if (!dir.exists("out")) dir.create("out")
if (!dir.exists("out/tables")) dir.create("out/tables", recursive = TRUE)


example_of <- function(x) {
  v <- x[!is.na(x)][1]
  if (length(v) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  as.character(v)
}


definitions <- c(
  cbsa                     = "Core Based Statistical Area code (5-digit GEOID).",
  cbsa_code                = "Core Based Statistical Area code (5-digit GEOID).",
  cbsa_fips                = "Core Based Statistical Area code (5-digit GEOID).",
  cbsa_id                  = "Core Based Statistical Area code (5-digit GEOID).",
  cbsa_name                = "CBSA name.",
  region                   = "Region identifier (CBSA/MSA/CZ).",
  region_name              = "Region name.",
  year                     = "Calendar year.",
  quarter                  = "Quarter number (1â€“4).",
  qtr                      = "Quarter number (1â€“4).",
  u_22_27_ba               = "Unemployment rate for BA-holding ages 22â€“27 (region-quarter).",
  u_ba_22_27               = "Unemployment rate for BA-holding ages 22â€“27 (region-quarter).",
  u_all                    = "Unemployment rate for all workers (region-quarter).",
  lf_w                     = "Population / labor-force weight used for aggregation (region-quarter).",
  pop_22_27                = "Population age 22â€“27 (count) used for weights.",
  young_pop                = "Young population used for weights (count).",
  flow_ba                  = "BA completions (supply flow) in region-quarter.",
  flow_ba_l1               = "Lag 1 of BA completions (region-quarter).",
  flow_ba_l2               = "Lag 2 of BA completions (region-quarter).",
  supply_flow_rt           = "Supply flow rate (new BA per young population).",
  supply_stock_rt          = "Supply stock rate (BA stock per young population).",
  postings_index           = "Job postings index (base â‰ˆ 100).",
  postings_rt              = "Job postings per young population (rate).",
  demand_post_rt           = "Demand proxy: postings per young population (rate).",
  bartik_demand            = "Bartik demand shifter (industry shiftâ€“share), unitless.",
  jolts_openings_rate_us   = "US job openings rate (JOLTS)."
)


unit_for <- function(nm, x) {
  nml <- tolower(nm)
  xnum <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  finite <- is.finite(xnum)

  if (nml %in% c("year")) return("year")
  if (nml %in% c("quarter","qtr","quarter_number")) return("1â€“4")
  if (grepl("cbsa", nml)) return("5-digit code")
  if (grepl("index", nml)) return("index (base=100)")
  if (grepl("bartik", nml)) return("unitless index")
  if (grepl("openings_rate", nml)) return("percent or rate")
  if (grepl("^u_", nml)) return("rate (share or %)")


  if (any(finite)) {
    mn <- suppressWarnings(min(xnum[finite], na.rm = TRUE))
    mx <- suppressWarnings(max(xnum[finite], na.rm = TRUE))

    if (mn >= 0 && mx <= 1.5) return("rate (0â€“1)")

    if (mn >= 0 && mx <= 100 && grepl("rate|share|pct|percent|u_", nml)) return("percent")

    if (all(abs(xnum[finite] - round(xnum[finite])) < 1e-8)) return("count")
  }
  NA_character_
}


nm <- names(panel)
classes <- vapply(panel, function(x) class(x)[1], character(1))
n <- nrow(panel)
n_missing <- vapply(panel, function(x) sum(is.na(x)), integer(1))
pct_missing <- round(100 * n_missing / n, 2)
n_unique <- vapply(panel, function(x) length(unique(x)), integer(1))
examples <- vapply(panel, example_of, character(1))


is_num <- vapply(panel, function(x) is.numeric(x) || is.integer(x), logical(1))
num_min <- rep(NA_real_, length(nm)); num_max <- num_min; num_mean <- num_min; num_sd <- num_min
num_min[is_num]  <- vapply(panel[is_num], function(x) suppressWarnings(min(x, na.rm = TRUE)), numeric(1))
num_max[is_num]  <- vapply(panel[is_num], function(x) suppressWarnings(max(x, na.rm = TRUE)), numeric(1))
num_mean[is_num] <- vapply(panel[is_num], function(x) suppressWarnings(mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)), numeric(1))
num_sd[is_num]   <- vapply(panel[is_num], function(x) suppressWarnings(sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)), numeric(1))


dict <- dplyr::tibble(
  name        = nm,
  class       = classes,
  n_missing   = n_missing,
  pct_missing = pct_missing,
  n_unique    = n_unique,
  example     = examples,
  min         = num_min,
  max         = num_max,
  mean        = num_mean,
  sd          = num_sd,
  definition  = unname(definitions[name]),
  unit        = vapply(seq_along(nm), function(i) unit_for(nm[i], panel[[i]]), character(1))
)


readr::write_csv(dict, "out/tables/data_dictionary.csv", na = "")
cat("Saved: out/tables/data_dictionary.csv\n")
dict |> dplyr::slice_head(n = 25)
```

```{r 69_to_72_baseline_ols_nolmtest, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

pick_col <- function(df, candidates, required = FALSE) {
  f <- intersect(candidates, names(df))
  if (length(f)) return(f[1])
  if (required) stop(paste("Missing required column. Tried:", paste(candidates, collapse=", ")))
  NA_character_
}
coef_table <- function(model, vcov_mat = NULL) {
  if (is.null(vcov_mat)) vcov_mat <- vcov(model)
  b  <- coef(model)
  se <- sqrt(diag(vcov_mat))
  t  <- b / se
  p  <- 2 * pt(-abs(t), df = df.residual(model))
  data.frame(term = names(b), estimate = b, std.error = se, t = t, p = p, row.names = NULL)
}
vcov_cluster <- function(model, cluster_vec = NULL) {

  if (!is.null(cluster_vec) && requireNamespace("sandwich", quietly = TRUE)) {
    return(sandwich::vcovCL(model, cluster = cluster_vec))
  }
  message("Note: Using classical (non-clustered) SEs because 'sandwich' is not installed.")
  vcov(model)
}


col_region <- pick_col(panel, c("cbsa","cbsa_code","cbsa_fips","cbsa_id","region","msa","cz"), TRUE)
col_year   <- pick_col(panel, c("year","yr"), TRUE)
col_qnum   <- pick_col(panel, c("quarter","qtr","quarter_number"), TRUE)


col_U <- pick_col(panel, c("u_22_27_ba","u_ba_22_27","unemp_ba_22_27","urate_ba_22_27","u_ba"), TRUE)
col_D <- pick_col(panel, c("demand_post_rt","postings_rt","post_per_young","d_post",
                           "ba_postings_rate","postings_index","bartik_demand"), TRUE)
col_S <- pick_col(panel, c("supply_flow_rt","ba_flow_rt","s_flow","flow_ba"), TRUE)


X_candidates <- c("jolts_openings_rate_us","flow_ba_l1","flow_ba_l2","lf_w","pop_22_27","young_pop")
X_vars <- intersect(X_candidates, names(panel))


DF <- panel |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    region = .data[[col_region]],
    year   = as.integer(.data[[col_year]]),
    qnum   = as.integer(.data[[col_qnum]]),
    t_id   = interaction(year, qnum, drop = TRUE),
    t_num  = (year - min(year, na.rm=TRUE)) * 4 + (qnum - 1),
    U      = as.numeric(.data[[col_U]]),
    D      = as.numeric(.data[[col_D]]),
    S      = as.numeric(.data[[col_S]]),
    !!!setNames(panel[, X_vars, drop = FALSE], X_vars)
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(is.finite(U) & is.finite(D) & is.finite(S))


rhs <- c("D","S", X_vars, "factor(region)", "factor(t_id)")
form1 <- as.formula(paste("U ~", paste(rhs, collapse = " + ")))
m1 <- lm(form1, data = DF)
vc1 <- vcov_cluster(m1, cluster_vec = ~ region)
ct1 <- coef_table(m1, vc1)


form2 <- update(form1, . ~ . + factor(region):t_num)
m2 <- lm(form2, data = DF)
vc2 <- vcov_cluster(m2, cluster_vec = ~ region)
ct2 <- coef_table(m2, vc2)


fit_tbl <- data.frame(
  model   = c("FE", "FE + region trends"),
  R2      = c(summary(m1)$r.squared, summary(m2)$r.squared),
  Adj_R2  = c(summary(m1)$adj.r.squared, summary(m2)$adj.r.squared),
  AIC     = c(AIC(m1), AIC(m2)),
  BIC     = c(BIC(m1), BIC(m2))
)


grab <- function(ct, nm) ct[match(nm, ct$term), c("estimate","std.error","p")]
cmp <- data.frame(
  term = c("D","S"),
  FE_est  = grab(ct1,"D")$estimate,  FE_se  = grab(ct1,"D")$std.error,  FE_p  = grab(ct1,"D")$p,
  FE_est_S= grab(ct1,"S")$estimate,  FE_se_S= grab(ct1,"S")$std.error,  FE_p_S= grab(ct1,"S")$p
)

cmp <- data.frame(
  term = c("D","S"),
  FE_est  = c(ct1$estimate[ct1$term=="D"], ct1$estimate[ct1$term=="S"]),
  FE_se   = c(ct1$std.error[ct1$term=="D"], ct1$std.error[ct1$term=="S"]),
  FE_p    = c(ct1$p[ct1$term=="D"],        ct1$p[ct1$term=="S"]),
  FEtr_est= c(ct2$estimate[ct2$term=="D"], ct2$estimate[ct2$term=="S"]),
  FEtr_se = c(ct2$std.error[ct2$term=="D"],ct2$std.error[ct2$term=="S"]),
  FEtr_p  = c(ct2$p[ct2$term=="D"],        ct2$p[ct2$term=="S"])
)


m_vif_D <- lm(D ~ S, data = DF); R2_D_on_S <- summary(m_vif_D)$r.squared
m_vif_S <- lm(S ~ D, data = DF); R2_S_on_D <- summary(m_vif_S)$r.squared
VIF_D <- 1 / (1 - R2_D_on_S)
VIF_S <- 1 / (1 - R2_S_on_D)
rho_DS <- cor(DF$D, DF$S, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")


cat("\n=== Baseline OLS with FE (cluster-robust if 'sandwich' available) ===\n")
print(ct1[ct1$term %in% c("D","S"), ], row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n=== OLS + Region Trends (cluster-robust if 'sandwich' available) ===\n")
print(ct2[ct2$term %in% c("D","S"), ], row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n=== Fit statistics ===\n"); print(fit_tbl, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n=== Multicollinearity diagnostics (D vs S) ===\n")
cat(sprintf("Corr(D,S) = %.3f | VIF(D) = %.2f | VIF(S) = %.2f\n", rho_DS, VIF_D, VIF_S))


cat("\nNOTE: These OLS models are DESCRIPTIVE.\n",
    "They include region and time fixed effects (and optional controls),\n",
    "and the trend-augmented model adds region-specific linear trends.\n",
    "Coefficients on D and S should NOT be interpreted causally due to potential\n",
    "omitted variables, simultaneity/endogeneity, and measurement error.\n", sep = "")
```

```{r 73_to_77_first_stage, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)


pick_col <- function(df, candidates, required = FALSE) {
  f <- intersect(candidates, names(df))
  if (length(f)) return(f[1])
  if (required) stop(paste("Missing required column. Tried:", paste(candidates, collapse=", ")))
  NA_character_
}
vcov_cluster <- function(model, cluster_vec = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(cluster_vec) && requireNamespace("sandwich", quietly = TRUE)) {
    return(sandwich::vcovCL(model, cluster = cluster_vec))
  }
  message("Note: Robust KP-style F uses classical vcov (sandwich not installed).")
  vcov(model)
}
wald_F <- function(model, terms, vc=NULL) {

  if (is.null(vc)) vc <- vcov(model)
  b <- coef(model)[terms]
  q <- length(terms)
  if (any(is.na(b)) || q == 0) return(NA_real_)
  V <- vc[terms, terms, drop=FALSE]
  as.numeric(t(b) %*% solve(V) %*% b) / q
}
partial_R2 <- function(m_restricted, m_full) {
  sse0 <- sum(resid(m_restricted)^2)
  sse1 <- sum(resid(m_full)^2)
  if (!is.finite(sse0) || sse0 <= 0) return(NA_real_)
  (sse0 - sse1) / sse0
}


col_region <- pick_col(panel, c("cbsa","cbsa_code","cbsa_fips","cbsa_id","region","msa","cz"), TRUE)
col_year   <- pick_col(panel, c("year","yr"), TRUE)
col_qnum   <- pick_col(panel, c("quarter","qtr","quarter_number"), TRUE)


col_D <- pick_col(panel, c("demand_post_rt","postings_rt","post_per_young","d_post",
                           "ba_postings_rate","postings_index"), TRUE)
col_S <- pick_col(panel, c("supply_flow_rt","ba_flow_rt","s_flow","flow_ba"), TRUE)


col_Bartik <- pick_col(panel, c("bartik_demand","demand_bartik_rt","bartik","d_bart","bartik_rt"), TRUE)
supplyIV_candidates <- c("supply_iv","supplyiv","cohort_size","cohort_growth","hs_grads",
                         "hs_grad_cohort","capacity","capacity_iv","funding_iv","funding_shock",
                         "tuition_shock","flow_ba_l1","flow_ba_l2","flow_ba_l3")
sIV <- intersect(supplyIV_candidates, names(panel))
if (length(sIV) == 0) message("Warning: No explicit supply IVs found; using lagged flows if present.")


X_candidates <- c("jolts_openings_rate_us","lf_w","pop_22_27","young_pop")
X_vars <- intersect(X_candidates, names(panel))


DF <- panel %>%
  transmute(
    region = .data[[col_region]],
    year   = as.integer(.data[[col_year]]),
    qnum   = as.integer(.data[[col_qnum]]),
    t_id   = interaction(year, qnum, drop = TRUE),
    D      = as.numeric(.data[[col_D]]),
    S      = as.numeric(.data[[col_S]]),
    Bartik = as.numeric(.data[[col_Bartik]]),
    !!!setNames(panel[, sIV, drop=FALSE], sIV),
    !!!setNames(panel[, X_vars, drop=FALSE], X_vars)
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(D) & is.finite(S) & is.finite(Bartik))


rhs_base <- c(X_vars, "factor(region)", "factor(t_id)")
formD0 <- as.formula(paste("D ~", paste(rhs_base, collapse = " + ")))
formD1 <- as.formula(paste("D ~ Bartik +", paste(rhs_base, collapse = " + ")))

mD0 <- lm(formD0, data = DF)
mD1 <- lm(formD1, data = DF)

vcD <- vcov_cluster(mD1, cluster_vec = ~ region)
F_KP_D <- wald_F(mD1, "Bartik", vcD)
R2_partial_D <- partial_R2(mD0, mD1)

DF$D_hat <- fitted(mD1)


if (length(sIV) > 0) {
  formS0 <- as.formula(paste("S ~", paste(rhs_base, collapse = " + ")))
  formS1 <- as.formula(paste("S ~", paste(sIV, collapse = " + "), "+", paste(rhs_base, collapse = " + ")))
  mS0 <- lm(formS0, data = DF)
  mS1 <- lm(formS1, data = DF)

  vcS <- vcov_cluster(mS1, cluster_vec = ~ region)
  F_KP_S <- wald_F(mS1, sIV, vcS)
  R2_partial_S <- partial_R2(mS0, mS1)

  DF$S_hat <- fitted(mS1)
} else {
  F_KP_S <- NA_real_; R2_partial_S <- NA_real_
  DF$S_hat <- NA_real_
}


cat("\n=== Demand first stage (D ~ Bartik + FE + X) ===\n")
cat(sprintf("Partial R^2 (Bartik | FE,X): %.3f\n", R2_partial_D))
cat(sprintf("KP-style robust F (Bartik):  %.2f\n", F_KP_D))

cat("\n=== Supply first stage (S ~ SupplyIV(s) + FE + X) ===\n")
cat(sprintf("Partial R^2 (SupplyIV | FE,X): %.3f\n", R2_partial_S))
cat(sprintf("KP-style robust F (joint):    %.2f  (q = %d IVs)\n", F_KP_S, length(sIV)))


flag <- function(Fstat) if (is.na(Fstat)) "n/a" else if (Fstat < 10) "âš ï¸Ž <10 (weak)" else "OK"
cat("\nWeak-IV check (rule-of-thumb Fâ‰¥10):\n",
    " Demand IV: ", flag(F_KP_D), "\n",
    " Supply IVs:", flag(F_KP_S), "\n", sep = "")

if (!exists("first_stage_out", inherits = FALSE)) {
  first_stage_out <- DF %>% select(region, year, qnum, D_hat, S_hat)
} else {
  first_stage_out <- DF %>% select(region, year, qnum, D_hat, S_hat)
}
assign("first_stage_out", first_stage_out, envir = .GlobalEnv)
cat("\nSaved predictions to object: first_stage_out (keys: region, year, qnum).\n")

if (!is.na(F_KP_D) && F_KP_D < 10 || !is.na(F_KP_S) && F_KP_S < 10) {
  cat("\nNOTE: At least one first-stage looks weak.\n",
      "- Consider aggregating time (e.g., annual), refining Bartik exposures, or pooling multiple supply IVs parsimoniously.\n",
      "- Plan B: LIML and Andersonâ€“Rubin tests in the structural step.\n", sep = "")
}
fs_tab$value <- round(as.numeric(fs_tab$value), 5)
print(fs_tab, row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r 2SLS_rates_lagged, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({library(dplyr)})


pick <- function(df, opts) { f <- intersect(opts, names(df)); if (length(f)) f[1] else NA_character_ }
vcov_cl <- function(mod, cluster=NULL){
  if(!is.null(cluster) && requireNamespace("sandwich", quietly=TRUE)) return(sandwich::vcovCL(mod, cluster=cluster))
  vcov(mod)
}
coef_tab <- function(m, V=NULL){
  if(is.null(V)) V <- vcov(m); b <- coef(m); se <- sqrt(diag(V)); t <- b/se
  data.frame(term=names(b), estimate=b, std.error=se, t=t, p=2*pt(-abs(t), df=df.residual(m)))
}


col_region <- pick(panel, c("cbsa","cbsa_code","cbsa_fips","cbsa_id","region","msa","cz"))
col_year   <- pick(panel, c("year","yr"))
col_q      <- pick(panel, c("quarter","qtr","quarter_number"))
col_U      <- pick(panel, c("u_22_27_ba","u_ba_22_27","unemp_ba_22_27","urate_ba_22_27","u_ba"))


col_D_rate <- pick(panel, c("demand_post_rt","postings_rt","post_per_young","ba_postings_rate"))
col_D_idx  <- pick(panel, c("d_post","postings_index"))


col_S_rate <- pick(panel, c("supply_flow_rt","ba_flow_rt","s_flow_rt"))
col_flow   <- pick(panel, c("flow_ba","s_flow"))
col_popY   <- pick(panel, c("pop_22_27","young_pop","lf_w"))


col_Bartik <- pick(panel, c("bartik_demand","demand_bartik_rt","bartik","d_bart","bartik_rt"))
sIV <- intersect(c("supply_iv","supplyiv","cohort_size","cohort_growth","hs_grads",
                   "hs_grad_cohort","capacity","capacity_iv","funding_iv","funding_shock",
                   "tuition_shock","flow_ba_l1","flow_ba_l2","flow_ba_l3"), names(panel))

stopifnot(!is.na(col_region), !is.na(col_year), !is.na(col_q), !is.na(col_U), !is.na(col_Bartik))


DF0 <- panel |>
  transmute(
    region = .data[[col_region]],
    year   = as.integer(.data[[col_year]]),
    qnum   = as.integer(.data[[col_q]]),
    t_id   = interaction(year, qnum, drop=TRUE),
    U      = as.numeric(.data[[col_U]]),
    D_raw  = if (!is.na(col_D_rate)) as.numeric(.data[[col_D_rate]])
             else if (!is.na(col_D_idx)) as.numeric(.data[[col_D_idx]]) else NA_real_,
    S_raw  = if (!is.na(col_S_rate)) as.numeric(.data[[col_S_rate]])
             else if (!is.na(col_flow) & !is.na(col_popY))
               as.numeric(.data[[col_flow]]) / as.numeric(.data[[col_popY]])
             else if (!is.na(col_flow)) as.numeric(.data[[col_flow]]) else NA_real_,
    Bartik = as.numeric(.data[[col_Bartik]]),
    !!!setNames(panel[, sIV, drop=FALSE], sIV)
  ) |>
  filter(is.finite(U) & is.finite(D_raw) & is.finite(S_raw) & is.finite(Bartik)) |>
  arrange(region, year, qnum) |>
  group_by(region) |>
  mutate(
    D  = as.numeric(scale(D_raw)),
    S  = as.numeric(scale(S_raw)),
    Dl1 = dplyr::lag(D, 1),
    Sl1 = dplyr::lag(S, 1),
    Bartik_l1 = dplyr::lag(Bartik, 1)
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(is.finite(Dl1) & is.finite(Sl1) & is.finite(Bartik_l1))


rhsFE <- "factor(region) + factor(t_id)"
fs_D <- lm(as.formula(paste("Dl1 ~ Bartik_l1 +", rhsFE)), DF0); DF0$Dl1_hat <- fitted(fs_D)

if (length(sIV) > 0) {
  fs_S <- lm(as.formula(paste("Sl1 ~", paste(sIV, collapse=" + "), "+", rhsFE)), DF0)
  DF0$Sl1_hat <- fitted(fs_S)
} else {
  DF0$Sl1_hat <- NA_real_
}


endog <- c("Dl1_hat", if(length(sIV)>0) "Sl1_hat")
form2 <- as.formula(paste("U ~", paste(c(endog, rhsFE), collapse=" + ")))
m2 <- lm(form2, DF0)
V2 <- vcov_cl(m2, cluster = ~ DF0$region)
tab <- coef_tab(m2, V2) |>
  dplyr::filter(term %in% endog) |>
  mutate(term = dplyr::recode(term, Dl1_hat="D_lag", Sl1_hat="S_lag")) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 4)))

cat("\n=== 2SLS on lagged rates (standardized) ===\n")
print(tab, row.names = FALSE)


sdU <- sd(DF0$U, na.rm=TRUE)
eff <- tibble::tibble(
  variable = c("D_lag","S_lag")[1:length(endog)],
  per_SD_change_in_U = tab$estimate * sd(DF0$D, na.rm=TRUE)[1]
)
```

```{r refine_suite_power_up, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({library(dplyr)})


pick <- function(df, opts) { f <- intersect(opts, names(df)); if (length(f)) f[1] else NA_character_ }
winsor <- function(x, p=0.01){
  qs <- quantile(x, c(p, 1-p), na.rm=TRUE); x <- pmin(pmax(x, qs[1]), qs[2]); as.numeric(x)
}
vcov_cl <- function(m, cluster=NULL){
  if(!is.null(cluster) && requireNamespace("sandwich", quietly=TRUE)) return(sandwich::vcovCL(m, cluster=cluster))
  vcov(m)
}
coef_tab <- function(m, V=NULL){
  if(is.null(V)) V <- vcov(m); b <- coef(m); se <- sqrt(diag(V)); t <- b/se
  data.frame(term=names(b), estimate=b, se=se, p=2*pt(-abs(t), df=df.residual(m)))
}
run_iv_manual <- function(data, y, endog_hat, fe_terms, w=NULL, cluster_vec=NULL){
  rhs <- paste(c(endog_hat, fe_terms), collapse=" + ")
  fm  <- as.formula(paste(y, "~", rhs))
  if(is.null(w)) mod <- lm(fm, data) else mod <- lm(fm, data, weights=w)
  V <- vcov_cl(mod, cluster = cluster_vec)
  out <- coef_tab(mod, V) |>
    dplyr::filter(term %in% endog_hat) |>
    dplyr::mutate(term = sub("_hat$","", term))
  attr(out, "vcov") <- V; attr(out, "model") <- mod; out
}
sum_lag_effect <- function(model, terms){
  V <- vcov_cl(model); b <- coef(model)
  a <- as.numeric(names(b) %in% terms)
  est <- sum(b[terms]); se <- sqrt(t(a) %*% V %*% a)
  p <- 2*pt(-abs(est/se), df=df.residual(model))
  c(est=est, se=se, p=p)
}


col_region <- pick(panel, c("cbsa","cbsa_code","cbsa_fips","cbsa_id","region","msa","cz"))
col_year   <- pick(panel, c("year","yr"))
col_q      <- pick(panel, c("quarter","qtr","quarter_number"))
col_U      <- pick(panel, c("u_22_27_ba","u_ba_22_27","unemp_ba_22_27","urate_ba_22_27","u_ba"))
col_D_rate <- pick(panel, c("demand_post_rt","postings_rt","post_per_young","ba_postings_rate"))
col_D_idx  <- pick(panel, c("d_post","postings_index"))
col_S_rate <- pick(panel, c("supply_flow_rt","ba_flow_rt","s_flow_rt"))
col_flow   <- pick(panel, c("flow_ba","s_flow"))
col_popY   <- pick(panel, c("pop_22_27","young_pop","lf_w"))
col_Bartik <- pick(panel, c("bartik_demand","demand_bartik_rt","bartik","d_bart","bartik_rt"))
sIV <- intersect(c("supply_iv","supplyiv","cohort_size","cohort_growth","hs_grads",
                   "hs_grad_cohort","capacity","capacity_iv","funding_iv","funding_shock",
                   "tuition_shock","flow_ba_l1","flow_ba_l2","flow_ba_l3"), names(panel))

stopifnot(!is.na(col_region), !is.na(col_year), !is.na(col_q), !is.na(col_U), !is.na(col_Bartik))


Q <- panel |>
  transmute(
    region = .data[[col_region]],
    year   = as.integer(.data[[col_year]]),
    qnum   = as.integer(.data[[col_q]]),
    t_id   = interaction(year, qnum, drop=TRUE),
    U      = as.numeric(.data[[col_U]]),
    D_raw  = if (!is.na(col_D_rate)) as.numeric(.data[[col_D_rate]])
             else if (!is.na(col_D_idx)) as.numeric(.data[[col_D_idx]]) else NA_real_,
    S_raw  = if (!is.na(col_S_rate)) as.numeric(.data[[col_S_rate]])
             else if (!is.na(col_flow) & !is.na(col_popY))
               as.numeric(.data[[col_flow]]) / as.numeric(.data[[col_popY]])
             else if (!is.na(col_flow)) as.numeric(.data[[col_flow]]) else NA_real_,
    Bartik = as.numeric(.data[[col_Bartik]]),
    w_pop  = if(!is.na(col_popY)) as.numeric(.data[[col_popY]]) else 1,
    !!!setNames(panel[, sIV, drop=FALSE], sIV)
  ) |>
  filter(is.finite(U) & is.finite(D_raw) & is.finite(S_raw) & is.finite(Bartik)) |>
  arrange(region, year, qnum) |>
  group_by(region) |>
  mutate(
    D  = as.numeric(scale(D_raw)),
    S  = as.numeric(scale(S_raw)),
    Dl1 = dplyr::lag(D, 1), Dl2 = dplyr::lag(D, 2), Dl3 = dplyr::lag(D, 3), Dl4 = dplyr::lag(D, 4),
    Sl1 = dplyr::lag(S, 1), Sl2 = dplyr::lag(S, 2), Sl3 = dplyr::lag(S, 3), Sl4 = dplyr::lag(S, 4),
    Bartik_l1 = dplyr::lag(Bartik, 1),
    Bartik_l2 = dplyr::lag(Bartik, 2),
    Bartik_l3 = dplyr::lag(Bartik, 3),
    Bartik_l4 = dplyr::lag(Bartik, 4)
  ) |>
  ungroup()


A <- Q |>
  filter(is.finite(Dl1), is.finite(Sl1), is.finite(Bartik_l1)) |>
  mutate(Dl1 = winsor(Dl1, .01), Sl1 = winsor(Sl1, .01),
         Bartik_l1 = winsor(Bartik_l1, .01),
         across(all_of(sIV), winsor, .01))


fs_D_A <- lm(Dl1 ~ Bartik_l1 + factor(region) + factor(t_id), A); A$Dl1_hat <- fitted(fs_D_A)
if (length(sIV) > 0) { fs_S_A <- lm(as.formula(paste("Sl1 ~", paste(c(sIV,"factor(region)","factor(t_id)"), collapse=" + "))), A); A$Sl1_hat <- fitted(fs_S_A) } else { A$Sl1_hat <- NA_real_ }

res_A_unw <- run_iv_manual(A, "U", c("Dl1_hat","Sl1_hat"), c("factor(region)","factor(t_id)"), w=NULL, cluster_vec=~A$region)
res_A_w   <- run_iv_manual(A, "U", c("Dl1_hat","Sl1_hat"), c("factor(region)","factor(t_id)"), w=A$w_pop, cluster_vec=~A$region)


B <- Q |>
  filter(across(c(Dl1:Dl4, Sl1:Sl4, Bartik_l1:Bartik_l4), is.finite))


fs_D_B <- lm(cbind(Dl1, Dl2, Dl3, Dl4) ~ Bartik_l1 + Bartik_l2 + Bartik_l3 + Bartik_l4 + factor(region) + factor(t_id), B)
B$Dl1_hat <- fitted(fs_D_B)[,1]; B$Dl2_hat <- fitted(fs_D_B)[,2]; B$Dl3_hat <- fitted(fs_D_B)[,3]; B$Dl4_hat <- fitted(fs_D_B)[,4]

if (length(sIV) > 0) {
  fs_S_B <- lm(cbind(Sl1, Sl2, Sl3, Sl4) ~ . + factor(region) + factor(t_id),
               data = B[, c("Sl1","Sl2","Sl3","Sl4","region","t_id", sIV), drop=FALSE])
  B$Sl1_hat <- fitted(fs_S_B)[,1]; B$Sl2_hat <- fitted(fs_S_B)[,2]; B$Sl3_hat <- fitted(fs_S_B)[,3]; B$Sl4_hat <- fitted(fs_S_B)[,4]
} else {
  B$Sl1_hat <- B$Sl2_hat <- B$Sl3_hat <- B$Sl4_hat <- NA_real_
}

endog_B <- c("Dl1_hat","Dl2_hat","Dl3_hat","Dl4_hat", if(length(sIV)>0) c("Sl1_hat","Sl2_hat","Sl3_hat","Sl4_hat"))
rhsFE <- c("factor(region)","factor(t_id)")
fm_B <- as.formula(paste("U ~", paste(c(endog_B, rhsFE), collapse=" + ")))
m_B <- lm(fm_B, B)
V_B <- vcov_cl(m_B, cluster=~B$region)

sumD <- sum_lag_effect(m_B, c("Dl1_hat","Dl2_hat","Dl3_hat","Dl4_hat"))

sumS <- if(length(sIV)>0) sum_lag_effect(m_B, c("Sl1_hat","Sl2_hat","Sl3_hat","Sl4_hat")) else c(est=NA, se=NA, p=NA)


Y <- Q |>
  group_by(region, year) |>
  summarise(U = mean(U, na.rm=TRUE),
            D = mean(D, na.rm=TRUE),
            S = mean(S, na.rm=TRUE),
            Bartik = mean(Bartik, na.rm=TRUE),
            w_pop = mean(w_pop, na.rm=TRUE),
            across(all_of(sIV), ~ mean(.x, na.rm=TRUE)),
            .groups="drop") |>
  arrange(region, year) |>
  group_by(region) |>
  mutate(Dl1 = dplyr::lag(D, 1), Sl1 = dplyr::lag(S, 1), Bartik_l1 = dplyr::lag(Bartik, 1)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(is.finite(Dl1), is.finite(Sl1), is.finite(Bartik_l1)) |>
  mutate(t_id = factor(year))

fs_D_Y <- lm(Dl1 ~ Bartik_l1 + factor(region) + factor(t_id), Y); Y$Dl1_hat <- fitted(fs_D_Y)
if (length(sIV) > 0) { fs_S_Y <- lm(as.formula(paste("Sl1 ~", paste(c(sIV,"factor(region)","factor(t_id)"), collapse=" + "))), Y); Y$Sl1_hat <- fitted(fs_S_Y) } else { Y$Sl1_hat <- NA_real_ }
res_Y_w <- run_iv_manual(Y, "U", c("Dl1_hat","Sl1_hat"), c("factor(region)","factor(t_id)"), w=Y$w_pop, cluster_vec=~Y$region)


tbl <- bind_rows(
  tibble(spec="Quarterly L1 (winsor, unweighted)", res_A_unw),
  tibble(spec="Quarterly L1 (winsor, weighted)",   res_A_w),
  tibble(spec="Annual L1 (weighted)",              res_Y_w)
) |>
  select(spec, term, estimate, se, p)

cum <- tibble(
  spec = "Quarterly DL L1â€“L4 (cumulative)",
  term = c("D_lags_sum","S_lags_sum"[length(sIV)>0]),
  estimate = c(sumD["est"], sumS["est"]),
  se       = c(sumD["se"],  sumS["se"]),
  p        = c(sumD["p"],   sumS["p"])
)

cat("\n=== Power-oriented specs (manual 2SLS with FE; clustered SEs if 'sandwich' is installed) ===\n")
print(bind_rows(tbl, cum) %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 4))))
```

```{r iv_cumulative_power_fixed, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({library(dplyr)})


vcov_cl <- function(m, cluster=NULL){
  if(!is.null(cluster) && requireNamespace("sandwich", quietly=TRUE)) return(sandwich::vcovCL(m, cluster=cluster))
  vcov(m)
}
coef_tab <- function(m, V=NULL){
  if(is.null(V)) V <- vcov(m); b<-coef(m); se<-sqrt(diag(V)); t<-b/se
  data.frame(term=names(b), estimate=b, std.error=se, t=t, p=2*pt(-abs(t), df=df.residual(m)))
}
wald_F <- function(model, terms, V=NULL){
  if(is.null(V)) V <- vcov(model); b <- coef(model)[terms]; if(any(is.na(b))) return(NA_real_)
  q <- length(terms); as.numeric(t(b) %*% solve(V[terms,terms,drop=FALSE]) %*% b) / q
}
partial_R2 <- function(m0, m1){ sse0 <- sum(resid(m0)^2); sse1 <- sum(resid(m1)^2); (sse0-sse1)/sse0 }


Q <- panel %>%
  transmute(
    region = .data[[col_region]],
    year   = as.integer(.data[[col_year]]),
    qnum   = as.integer(.data[[col_q]]),
    t_id   = interaction(year, qnum, drop = TRUE),
    U      = as.numeric(.data[[col_U]]),
    D_raw  = if (!is.na(col_D_rate)) as.numeric(.data[[col_D_rate]])
             else if (!is.na(col_D_idx)) as.numeric(.data[[col_D_idx]]) else NA_real_,
    S_raw  = if (!is.na(col_S_rate)) as.numeric(.data[[col_S_rate]])
             else if (!is.na(col_flow) & !is.na(col_popY))
               as.numeric(.data[[col_flow]]) / as.numeric(.data[[col_popY]])
             else if (!is.na(col_flow)) as.numeric(.data[[col_flow]]) else NA_real_,
    Bartik = as.numeric(.data[[col_Bartik]]),
    !!!setNames(panel[, sIV, drop = FALSE], sIV)
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(U) & is.finite(D_raw) & is.finite(S_raw) & is.finite(Bartik)) %>%
  mutate(pandemic = (year == 2020 & qnum >= 2) | (year == 2021)) %>%
  filter(!pandemic) %>%
  arrange(region, year, qnum) %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  mutate(
    D  = as.numeric(scale(D_raw)),
    S  = as.numeric(scale(S_raw)),
    Dl1 = dplyr::lag(D, 1), Dl2 = dplyr::lag(D, 2), Dl3 = dplyr::lag(D, 3), Dl4 = dplyr::lag(D, 4),
    Sl1 = dplyr::lag(S, 1), Sl2 = dplyr::lag(S, 2), Sl3 = dplyr::lag(S, 3), Sl4 = dplyr::lag(S, 4),
    B1  = dplyr::lag(Bartik, 1), B2 = dplyr::lag(Bartik, 2), B3 = dplyr::lag(Bartik, 3), B4 = dplyr::lag(Bartik, 4)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(dplyr::if_all(dplyr::all_of(c("Dl1","Dl2","Dl3","Dl4","Sl1","Sl2","Sl3","Sl4","B1","B2","B3","B4")),
                       ~ is.finite(.x))) %>%

  mutate(
    Dsum = Dl1 + Dl2 + Dl3 + Dl4,
    Ssum = Sl1 + Sl2 + Sl3 + Sl4
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(Dsum))


fsD0 <- lm(Dsum ~ factor(region) + factor(t_id), Q)
fsD1 <- lm(Dsum ~ B1 + B2 + B3 + B4 + factor(region) + factor(t_id), Q)
Q$Dsum_hat <- fitted(fsD1)
F_Dsum <- wald_F(fsD1, c("B1","B2","B3","B4"))
R2p_D  <- partial_R2(fsD0, fsD1)

if (length(sIV) > 0) {
  fsS0 <- lm(Ssum ~ factor(region) + factor(t_id), Q)
  fsS1 <- lm(as.formula(paste("Ssum ~", paste(c(sIV,"factor(region)","factor(t_id)"), collapse=" + "))), Q)
  Q$Ssum_hat <- fitted(fsS1)
  F_Ssum <- wald_F(fsS1, sIV)
  R2p_S  <- partial_R2(fsS0, fsS1)
} else {
  Q$Ssum_hat <- NA_real_; F_Ssum <- NA_real_; R2p_S <- NA_real_
}

cat(sprintf("First-stage (Dsum): partial R^2 = %.3f | KP rk F = %.2f\n", R2p_D, F_Dsum))
if (!is.na(F_Ssum)) cat(sprintf("First-stage (Ssum): partial R^2 = %.3f | KP rk F = %.2f\n", R2p_S, F_Ssum))


m2_D  <- lm(U ~ Dsum_hat + factor(region) + factor(t_id), Q)
V_D   <- vcov_cl(m2_D, cluster = ~ Q$region)
tabD  <- coef_tab(m2_D, V_D) %>% dplyr::filter(term=="Dsum_hat") %>% dplyr::mutate(term="Dsum")

m2_DS <- lm(U ~ Dsum_hat + Ssum_hat + factor(region) + factor(t_id), Q)
V_DS  <- vcov_cl(m2_DS, cluster = ~ Q$region)
tabDS <- coef_tab(m2_DS, V_DS) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term %in% c("Dsum_hat","Ssum_hat")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term = dplyr::recode(term, Dsum_hat="Dsum", Ssum_hat="Ssum"))

cat("\n=== 2SLS on cumulative lags (standardized rates) ===\n")
print(rbind(
  cbind(model="Dsum only", tabD),
  cbind(model="Dsum & Ssum", tabDS)
) %>% dplyr::mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 4))), row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r robustness_83_87_90_fixed, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({library(dplyr)})


pick <- function(df, opts){ f <- intersect(opts, names(df)); if (length(f)) f[1] else NA_character_ }
vcov_1way <- function(m, cluster){
  if (requireNamespace("sandwich", quietly=TRUE)) sandwich::vcovCL(m, cluster=cluster) else vcov(m)
}
vcov_2way <- function(m, cl1, cl2){
  if (requireNamespace("multiwayvcov", quietly=TRUE)) {
    multiwayvcov::vcovDC(m, cluster = data.frame(cl1=cl1, cl2=cl2))
  } else {
    attr(m, "two_way_note") <- "multiwayvcov not installed; fell back to region clustering."
    vcov_1way(m, cluster = ~cl1)
  }
}
tidy_coef <- function(m, V, terms){
  b <- coef(m)[terms]; se <- sqrt(diag(V))[terms]; t <- b/se
  data.frame(term=terms, estimate=b, std.error=se, t=t,
             p=2*pt(-abs(t), df=df.residual(m)), row.names=NULL, check.names=FALSE)
}
wald_joint <- function(m, terms, V=NULL){
  if (is.null(V)) V <- vcov(m)
  b <- coef(m)[terms]; if (any(is.na(b))) return(c(F=NA, p=NA))
  q <- length(terms); F <- as.numeric(t(b) %*% solve(V[terms,terms,drop=FALSE]) %*% b) / q
  p <- pf(F, q, df.residual(m), lower.tail=FALSE); c(F=F, p=p)
}
round_df <- function(x, k=4){ dplyr::mutate(x, dplyr::across(where(is.numeric), ~round(.x, k))) }


col_region <- pick(panel, c("cbsa","cbsa_code","cbsa_fips","cbsa_id","region","msa","cz"))
col_year   <- pick(panel, c("year","yr"))
col_q      <- pick(panel, c("quarter","qtr","quarter_number"))
col_U      <- pick(panel, c("u_22_27_ba","u_ba_22_27","unemp_ba_22_27","urate_ba_22_27","u_ba"))
col_D_rate <- pick(panel, c("demand_post_rt","postings_rt","post_per_young","ba_postings_rate"))
col_D_idx  <- pick(panel, c("d_post","postings_index"))
col_S_rate <- pick(panel, c("supply_flow_rt","ba_flow_rt","s_flow_rt"))
col_flow   <- pick(panel, c("flow_ba","s_flow"))
col_popY   <- pick(panel, c("pop_22_27","young_pop","lf_w"))
col_Bartik <- pick(panel, c("bartik_demand","demand_bartik_rt","bartik","d_bart","bartik_rt"))

stopifnot(!is.na(col_region), !is.na(col_year), !is.na(col_q), !is.na(col_U), !is.na(col_Bartik))


Qr <- panel %>%
  transmute(
    region = .data[[col_region]],
    year   = as.integer(.data[[col_year]]),
    qnum   = as.integer(.data[[col_q]]),
    t_id   = interaction(year, qnum, drop=TRUE),
    U      = as.numeric(.data[[col_U]]),
    D_raw  = if (!is.na(col_D_rate)) as.numeric(.data[[col_D_rate]])
             else if (!is.na(col_D_idx)) as.numeric(.data[[col_D_idx]]) else NA_real_,
    S_raw  = if (!is.na(col_S_rate)) as.numeric(.data[[col_S_rate]])
             else if (!is.na(col_flow) & !is.na(col_popY))
               as.numeric(.data[[col_flow]]) / as.numeric(.data[[col_popY]])
             else if (!is.na(col_flow)) as.numeric(.data[[col_flow]]) else NA_real_,
    Bartik = as.numeric(.data[[col_Bartik]]),
    size_w = if (!is.na(col_popY)) as.numeric(.data[[col_popY]]) else NA_real_
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(U) & is.finite(D_raw) & is.finite(S_raw) & is.finite(Bartik)) %>%
  mutate(pandemic = (year==2020 & qnum>=2) | (year==2021)) %>%
  filter(!pandemic) %>%
  arrange(region, year, qnum) %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  mutate(
    D  = as.numeric(scale(D_raw)),
    S  = as.numeric(scale(S_raw)),
    Dl1 = dplyr::lag(D,1), Dl2 = dplyr::lag(D,2), Dl3 = dplyr::lag(D,3), Dl4 = dplyr::lag(D,4),
    Sl1 = dplyr::lag(S,1), Sl2 = dplyr::lag(S,2), Sl3 = dplyr::lag(S,3), Sl4 = dplyr::lag(S,4),
    B1  = dplyr::lag(Bartik,1), B2 = dplyr::lag(Bartik,2), B3 = dplyr::lag(Bartik,3), B4 = dplyr::lag(Bartik,4)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(dplyr::if_all(dplyr::all_of(c("Dl1","Dl2","Dl3","Dl4","Sl1","Sl2","Sl3","Sl4","B1","B2","B3","B4")), ~is.finite(.x))) %>%
  mutate(Dsum = Dl1+Dl2+Dl3+Dl4,
         Ssum = Sl1+Sl2+Sl3+Sl4)


fsD_full <- lm(Dsum ~ B1 + B2 + B3 + B4 + factor(region) + factor(t_id), Qr)
Qr$Dsum_hat <- fitted(fsD_full)


m_base <- lm(U ~ Dsum_hat + factor(region) + factor(t_id), Qr)


m_rf  <- lm(U ~ B1 + B2 + B3 + B4 + factor(region) + factor(t_id), Qr)
V_rf  <- vcov_1way(m_rf, cluster = ~Qr$region)
rf_tab   <- tidy_coef(m_rf, V_rf, c("B1","B2","B3","B4"))
rf_joint <- wald_joint(m_rf, c("B1","B2","B3","B4"), V_rf)

cat("\n=== (83) Reduced form: U ~ Bartik lags + FE (region-clustered SEs) ===\n")
print(round_df(rf_tab, 4))
cat(sprintf("Joint Wald F (B1..B4) = %.2f, p = %.4f\n", rf_joint["F"], rf_joint["p"]))


if (!all(is.na(Qr$size_w))) {
  top5 <- Qr %>%
    dplyr::group_by(region) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(size = mean(size_w, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(size)) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 5) %>%
    dplyr::pull(region)
} else {
  top5 <- Qr %>%
    dplyr::count(region, sort = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 5) %>%
    dplyr::pull(region)
}

Qr_small <- Qr %>% dplyr::filter(!(region %in% top5))


fsD_small <- lm(Dsum ~ B1 + B2 + B3 + B4 + factor(region) + factor(t_id), data = Qr_small)
Qr_small$Dsum_hat <- fitted(fsD_small)


m_drop5 <- lm(U ~ Dsum_hat + factor(region) + factor(t_id), data = Qr_small)


V_drop5 <- if (requireNamespace("sandwich", quietly = TRUE)) {
  sandwich::vcovCL(m_drop5, cluster = ~ Qr_small$region)
} else vcov(m_drop5)

b  <- coef(m_drop5)["Dsum_hat"]
se <- sqrt(diag(V_drop5))["Dsum_hat"]
t  <- as.numeric(b/se)
p  <- 2*pt(-abs(t), df = df.residual(m_drop5))

print(data.frame(model="Drop top-5", term="Dsum",
                 estimate=b, std.error=se, t=t, p=p))
cat("Dropped regions:\n"); print(top5)
```

```{r}
library(arrow)
library(dplyr)





add <- read_parquet("~/Journal_Project_2025/data_final/panel_additions_cbsa_q.parquet")

keys <- c("cbsa","year","quarter")


panel <- panel %>%
  mutate(cbsa = as.character(cbsa),
         year = as.integer(year),
         quarter = as.integer(quarter))

add <- add %>%
  mutate(cbsa = as.character(cbsa),
         year = as.integer(year),
         quarter = as.integer(quarter))


stopifnot(
  nrow(add %>% count(across(all_of(keys))) %>% filter(n > 1)) == 0
)



add_cols <- setdiff(names(add), keys)
collide  <- intersect(add_cols, names(panel))
if (length(collide)) {
  add <- add %>% rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_add"), all_of(collide))
}


panel <- panel %>%
  left_join(select(add, all_of(keys), any_of(c("d_entry_idx",
                                               "bartik_entry",
                                               "u_22_27_nonba",
                                               "u_28_35_ba",
                                               paste0(collide, "_add")))),
            by = keys)


summary(select(panel, dplyr::any_of(c("d_entry_idx","bartik_entry","u_22_27_nonba","u_28_35_ba"))))
```

```{r four_robustness_tests_fixed2, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(dplyr) })


has2 <- function(x) length(unique(x[is.finite(x) & !is.na(x)])) >= 2
vcov_smart <- function(m, cluster_vec=NULL){
  if (requireNamespace("sandwich", quietly=TRUE)){
    if (!is.null(cluster_vec) && has2(cluster_vec)) sandwich::vcovCL(m, cluster=cluster_vec)
    else sandwich::vcovHC(m, type="HC1")
  } else vcov(m)
}
coef_row <- function(m, nm, V){
  b  <- coef(m)[nm]; se <- sqrt(diag(V))[nm]
  t  <- as.numeric(b/se); p <- 2*pt(-abs(t), df = df.residual(m))
  data.frame(term=nm, estimate=b, std.error=se, t=t, p=p, row.names=NULL)
}
wald_F <- function(m, V, names_vec){
  b <- coef(m); keep <- intersect(names_vec, names(b))
  if (!length(keep)) return(c(F=NA_real_, p=NA_real_))
  bS <- matrix(b[keep], ncol=1); VS <- as.matrix(V[keep, keep, drop=FALSE]); k <- length(keep)
  if (anyNA(VS) || k==0) return(c(F=NA_real_, p=NA_real_))
  Fstat <- as.numeric(t(bS) %*% solve(VS) %*% bS / k); pval <- 1 - pf(Fstat, k, df.residual(m))
  c(F=Fstat, p=pval)
}
fe_terms <- function(dat){
  parts <- character(0)
  if (has2(dat$region)) parts <- c(parts, "factor(region)")
  if (has2(dat$t_id))   parts <- c(parts, "factor(t_id)")
  if (length(parts)) paste("+", paste(parts, collapse=" + ")) else ""
}


stopifnot(exists("panel"))
nm <- names(panel)
col_region <- if ("region" %in% nm) "region" else "cbsa"
col_year   <- "year"; col_q <- "quarter"
col_U_ba   <- if ("u_22_27_ba" %in% nm) "u_22_27_ba" else stop("u_22_27_ba not found.")
col_nonba  <- if ("u_22_27_nonba" %in% nm) "u_22_27_nonba" else if ("u_22_27_nonba_add" %in% nm) "u_22_27_nonba_add" else NA_character_
col_u2835  <- if ("u_28_35_ba" %in% nm) "u_28_35_ba" else NA_character_
col_ba_bartik <- if ("bartik_demand" %in% nm) "bartik_demand" else if ("bartik" %in% nm) "bartik" else if ("bartik_nonba" %in% nm) "bartik_nonba" else NA_character_
col_entry_D  <- if ("d_entry_idx" %in% nm) "d_entry_idx" else NA_character_
col_entry_IV <- if ("bartik_entry" %in% nm) "bartik_entry" else NA_character_

Df <- panel %>%
  transmute(
    region = .data[[col_region]],
    year   = .data[[col_year]],
    q      = .data[[col_q]],
    t_id   = interaction(year, q, drop=TRUE),
    U_ba   = .data[[col_U_ba]],
    U_non  = if (!is.na(col_nonba)) .data[[col_nonba]] else NA_real_,
    U_2835 = if (!is.na(col_u2835)) .data[[col_u2835]] else NA_real_,
    Bartik_ba = if (!is.na(col_ba_bartik)) .data[[col_ba_bartik]] else NA_real_,
    D_entry   = if (!is.na(col_entry_D))  .data[[col_entry_D]]  else NA_real_,
    IV_entry  = if (!is.na(col_entry_IV)) .data[[col_entry_IV]] else NA_real_
  ) %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  arrange(region, year, q, .by_group=TRUE) %>%
  mutate(B1 = dplyr::lag(Bartik_ba, 1),
         B2 = dplyr::lag(Bartik_ba, 2),
         B3 = dplyr::lag(Bartik_ba, 3),
         B4 = dplyr::lag(Bartik_ba, 4)) %>%
  ungroup()

round_df <- function(df) dplyr::mutate(df, dplyr::across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 6)))





res1 <- list(info=NA, coef=NA)
if (!is.na(col_entry_D) && !is.na(col_entry_IV)) {
  Q1_fs <- Df %>% filter(is.finite(D_entry), is.finite(IV_entry))
  if (nrow(Q1_fs) >= 10) {
    fes1  <- fe_terms(Q1_fs)
    fs1   <- lm(as.formula(paste0("D_entry ~ IV_entry ", fes1)), data=Q1_fs)
    Vfs1  <- vcov_smart(fs1, cluster_vec = Q1_fs$region)
    kp1   <- wald_F(fs1, Vfs1, "IV_entry")
    Q1_2  <- Q1_fs %>% mutate(Dhat = fitted(fs1)) %>% filter(is.finite(U_ba), is.finite(Dhat))
    if (nrow(Q1_2) >= 10) {

      fes1b <- fe_terms(Q1_2)
      m1   <- lm(as.formula(paste0("U_ba ~ Dhat ", fes1b)), data=Q1_2)
      Vm1  <- vcov_smart(m1, cluster_vec = Q1_2$region)
      res1$info <- data.frame(model="Alt demand 2SLS (entry)", n_fs=nrow(Q1_fs), n_ss=nrow(Q1_2),
                              KP_F=kp1[["F"]], KP_p=kp1[["p"]])
      res1$coef <- coef_row(m1, "Dhat", Vm1)
    } else {
      res1$info <- data.frame(model="Alt demand 2SLS (entry)", n_fs=nrow(Q1_fs), n_ss=nrow(Q1_2),
                              KP_F=kp1[["F"]], KP_p=kp1[["p"]])
      res1$coef <- data.frame(term="Dhat", estimate=NA, std.error=NA, t=NA, p=NA)
    }
  } else {
    res1$info <- data.frame(model="Alt demand 2SLS (entry)", n_fs=nrow(Q1_fs), n_ss=NA, KP_F=NA, KP_p=NA)
    res1$coef <- data.frame(term="Dhat", estimate=NA, std.error=NA, t=NA, p=NA)
  }
} else {
  res1$info <- data.frame(model="Alt demand 2SLS (entry)", n_fs=NA, n_ss=NA, KP_F=NA, KP_p=NA)
  res1$coef <- data.frame(term="Dhat", estimate=NA, std.error=NA, t=NA, p=NA)
}




res2 <- list(info=NA, coef=NA)
if (!is.na(col_nonba) && !is.na(col_ba_bartik)) {
  Q2 <- Df %>% filter(is.finite(U_ba), is.finite(U_non), is.finite(Bartik_ba), is.finite(B1), is.finite(B2), is.finite(B3), is.finite(B4))
  if (nrow(Q2) >= 10){
    fes2 <- fe_terms(Q2)
    fs2  <- lm(as.formula(paste0("Bartik_ba ~ B1 + B2 + B3 + B4 ", fes2)), data=Q2)
    Vfs2 <- vcov_smart(fs2, cluster_vec = Q2$region)
    kp2  <- wald_F(fs2, Vfs2, c("B1","B2","B3","B4"))
    Q2$Dhat2 <- fitted(fs2)
    m2   <- lm(as.formula(paste0("U_ba ~ Dhat2 + U_non ", fes2)), data=Q2)
    Vm2  <- vcov_smart(m2, cluster_vec = Q2$region)
    res2$info <- data.frame(model="Main BA + non-BA control (2SLS via Bartik lags)",
                            n=nrow(Q2), KP_F=kp2[["F"]], KP_p=kp2[["p"]])
    res2$coef <- rbind(coef_row(m2, "Dhat2", Vm2), coef_row(m2, "U_non", Vm2))
  } else {
    res2$info <- data.frame(model="Main BA + non-BA control (2SLS)", n=nrow(Q2), KP_F=NA, KP_p=NA)
    res2$coef <- data.frame(term=c("Dhat2","U_non"), estimate=NA, std.error=NA, t=NA, p=NA)
  }
} else {
  res2$info <- data.frame(model="Main BA + non-BA control (2SLS)", n=NA, KP_F=NA, KP_p=NA)
  res2$coef <- data.frame(term=c("Dhat2","U_non"), estimate=NA, std.error=NA, t=NA, p=NA)
}




res3 <- list(info=NA, coef=NA)
if (!is.na(col_nonba) && !is.na(col_ba_bartik)) {
  Q3 <- Df %>% filter(is.finite(U_non), is.finite(B1), is.finite(B2), is.finite(B3), is.finite(B4))
  if (nrow(Q3) >= 10){
    fes3 <- fe_terms(Q3)
    rf3  <- lm(as.formula(paste0("U_non ~ B1 + B2 + B3 + B4 ", fes3)), data=Q3)
    V3   <- vcov_smart(rf3, cluster_vec = Q3$region)
    names_iv <- c("B1","B2","B3","B4")
    tab3 <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names_iv, function(nm) coef_row(rf3, nm, V3)))
    kp3  <- wald_F(rf3, V3, names_iv)
    res3$info <- data.frame(model="Placebo (instrument): BA Bartik â†’ non-BA U (RF)",
                            n=nrow(Q3), Joint_Wald_F = kp3[["F"]], Joint_p = kp3[["p"]])
    res3$coef <- tab3
  } else {
    res3$info <- data.frame(model="Placebo (instrument): BA Bartik â†’ non-BA U (RF)", n=nrow(Q3),
                            Joint_Wald_F=NA, Joint_p=NA)
    res3$coef <- data.frame(term=c("B1","B2","B3","B4"),
                            estimate=NA, std.error=NA, t=NA, p=NA)
  }
} else {
  res3$info <- data.frame(model="Placebo (instrument): BA Bartik â†’ non-BA U (RF)", n=NA,
                          Joint_Wald_F=NA, Joint_p=NA)
  res3$coef <- data.frame(term=c("B1","B2","B3","B4"),
                          estimate=NA, std.error=NA, t=NA, p=NA)
}




res4 <- list(info=NA, coef=NA)
if (!is.na(col_u2835) && !is.na(col_ba_bartik)) {
  Q4 <- Df %>% filter(is.finite(U_2835), is.finite(Bartik_ba), is.finite(B1), is.finite(B2), is.finite(B3), is.finite(B4))
  if (nrow(Q4) >= 10){
    fes4 <- fe_terms(Q4)
    fs4  <- lm(as.formula(paste0("Bartik_ba ~ B1 + B2 + B3 + B4 ", fes4)), data=Q4)
    Vfs4 <- vcov_smart(fs4, cluster_vec = Q4$region)
    kp4  <- wald_F(fs4, Vfs4, c("B1","B2","B3","B4"))
    Q4$Dhat4 <- fitted(fs4)
    m4   <- lm(as.formula(paste0("U_2835 ~ Dhat4 ", fes4)), data=Q4)
    Vm4  <- vcov_smart(m4, cluster_vec = Q4$region)
    res4$info <- data.frame(model="Placebo (outcome): BA 28â€“35 (2SLS via Bartik lags)",
                            n=nrow(Q4), KP_F=kp4[["F"]], KP_p=kp4[["p"]])
    res4$coef <- coef_row(m4, "Dhat4", Vm4)
  } else {
    res4$info <- data.frame(model="Placebo (outcome): BA 28â€“35 (2SLS)", n=nrow(Q4), KP_F=NA, KP_p=NA)
    res4$coef <- data.frame(term="Dhat4", estimate=NA, std.error=NA, t=NA, p=NA)
  }
} else {
  res4$info <- data.frame(model="Placebo (outcome): BA 28â€“35 (2SLS)", n=NA, KP_F=NA, KP_p=NA)
  res4$coef <- data.frame(term="Dhat4", estimate=NA, std.error=NA, t=NA, p=NA)
}


cat("\n=== (1) Alt demand 2SLS: D = d_entry_idx, IV = bartik_entry ===\n")
print(round_df(res1$info)); print(round_df(res1$coef))

cat("\n=== (2) Main BA + control (non-BA U) â€” 2SLS with Bartik lags ===\n")
print(round_df(res2$info)); print(round_df(res2$coef))

cat("\n=== (3) Instrument placebo (RF): BA Bartik â†’ non-BA youth unemployment ===\n")
print(round_df(res3$info)); print(round_df(res3$coef))

cat("\n=== (4) Outcome placebo (2SLS): outcome = BA ages 28â€“35 ===\n")
print(round_df(res4$info)); print(round_df(res4$coef))
```

```{r}



suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
})



pick_col <- function(df, candidates) {
  candidates <- candidates[candidates %in% names(df)]
  if (length(candidates)) candidates[[1]] else NA_character_
}

finite_lags <- function(df, cand) {
  cand <- intersect(cand, names(df))
  keep <- vapply(cand, function(cl)
    sum(is.finite(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[cl]])))), numeric(1))
  cand[keep > 0]
}

tidy_one <- function(mod, coef_name, label) {
  sm <- summary(mod)$coef
  if (!coef_name %in% rownames(sm)) {
    return(data.frame(term = label, estimate = NA, std.error = NA, t = NA, p = NA))
  }
  c <- sm[coef_name, , drop = FALSE]
  data.frame(
    term = label,
    estimate = as.numeric(c[1]),
    std.error = as.numeric(c[2]),
    t = as.numeric(c[3]),
    p = as.numeric(c[4])
  )
}

wald_F <- function(full, drop_vars) {

  rhs <- as.character(formula(full))[3]
  for (v in drop_vars) rhs <- gsub(paste0("\\+\\s*", v), "", rhs)
  red <- update(full, paste(". ~", rhs))
  a <- anova(red, full)
  data.frame(F = a$`F`[2], p = a$`Pr(>F)`[2])
}



DF <- panel

col_region <- pick_col(DF, c("region","cbsa","cbsa_code","cbsa_id"))
col_year   <- pick_col(DF, c("year","YEAR"))
col_q      <- pick_col(DF, c("qnum","quarter","qtr"))

col_U_ba22 <- pick_col(DF, c("u_22_27_ba","u_ba_22_27","u_ba"))
col_U_non  <- pick_col(DF, c("u_22_27_nonba_add","u_22_27_nonba","u_non"))
col_U_ba28 <- pick_col(DF, c("u_28_35_ba"))

col_D_main <- pick_col(DF, c("Dsum","D","postings_index","d_idx","demand_idx"))
col_D_entry<- pick_col(DF, c("d_entry_idx"))

col_BA_btk <- pick_col(DF, c("bartik_demand","bartik_ba","bartik","Bartik"))
col_EN_btk <- pick_col(DF, c("bartik_entry"))
col_NB_btk <- pick_col(DF, c("bartik_nonba"))

stopifnot(!is.na(col_region), !is.na(col_year), !is.na(col_q))
stopifnot(!is.na(col_U_ba22))
stopifnot(!is.na(col_BA_btk))



Q0 <- DF %>%
  transmute(
    region = .data[[col_region]],
    year   = as.integer(.data[[col_year]]),
    qnum   = as.integer(.data[[col_q]]),
    t_id   = interaction(year, qnum, drop = TRUE),

    U_ba22 = as.numeric(.data[[col_U_ba22]]),
    U_non  = if (!is.na(col_U_non))  as.numeric(.data[[col_U_non]])  else NA_real_,
    U_ba28 = if (!is.na(col_U_ba28)) as.numeric(.data[[col_U_ba28]]) else NA_real_,

    D_main  = if (!is.na(col_D_main))  as.numeric(scale(.data[[col_D_main]]))  else NA_real_,
    D_entry = if (!is.na(col_D_entry)) as.numeric(scale(.data[[col_D_entry]])) else NA_real_,

    BA_btk = as.numeric(.data[[col_BA_btk]]),
    EN_btk = if (!is.na(col_EN_btk)) as.numeric(.data[[col_EN_btk]]) else NA_real_,
    NB_btk = if (!is.na(col_NB_btk)) as.numeric(.data[[col_NB_btk]]) else NA_real_
  ) %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  mutate(
    B1  = dplyr::lag(BA_btk, 1), B2  = dplyr::lag(BA_btk, 2),
    B3  = dplyr::lag(BA_btk, 3), B4  = dplyr::lag(BA_btk, 4),
    B1e = dplyr::lag(EN_btk, 1), B2e = dplyr::lag(EN_btk, 2),
    B3e = dplyr::lag(EN_btk, 3), B4e = dplyr::lag(EN_btk, 4),
    B1n = dplyr::lag(NB_btk, 1), B2n = dplyr::lag(NB_btk, 2),
    B3n = dplyr::lag(NB_btk, 3), B4n = dplyr::lag(NB_btk, 4)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()







Out1 <- list(
  header = data.frame(
    model = "Alt demand 2SLS (entry) â€” D_entry via entry-Bartik lags",
    n_fs  = 0, n_ss = NA, KP_F = NA, KP_p = NA
  )
)

if (!is.na(col_D_entry) && !is.na(col_EN_btk)) {

  Qe <- Q0 %>%
    filter(is.finite(D_entry), is.finite(U_ba22)) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(finite_lags(., c("B1e","B2e","B3e","B4e"))),
                  ~ is.finite(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x)))))

  iv_keep <- finite_lags(Qe, c("B1e","B2e","B3e","B4e"))

  if (length(iv_keep) >= 1 && nrow(Qe) > 0) {
    fs1 <- lm(as.formula(paste0("D_entry ~ ", paste(iv_keep, collapse = "+"),
                                " + factor(region) + factor(t_id)")), data = Qe)
    jf  <- wald_F(fs1, iv_keep)
    Qe$D_entry_hat <- fitted(fs1)

    ss1 <- lm(U_ba22 ~ D_entry_hat + factor(region) + factor(t_id), data = Qe)

    Out1$header <- data.frame(
      model = "Alt demand 2SLS (entry) â€” D_entry via entry-Bartik lags",
      n_fs  = nobs(fs1), n_ss = nobs(ss1),
      KP_F  = jf$F, KP_p = jf$p
    )
    Out1$coef <- tidy_one(ss1, "D_entry_hat", "Effect of entry-level demand (2SLS)")
  }
}







Out2 <- list(
  header = data.frame(model = "Main BA 2SLS + non-BA control", n = NA, KP_F = NA, KP_p = NA)
)

if (!is.na(col_D_main)) {
  Qb <- Q0 %>%
    filter(is.finite(D_main), is.finite(U_ba22)) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(finite_lags(., c("B1","B2","B3","B4"))),
                  ~ is.finite(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x)))))

  iv_keep2 <- finite_lags(Qb, c("B1","B2","B3","B4"))

  if (length(iv_keep2) >= 1 && nrow(Qb) > 0) {
    fs2 <- lm(as.formula(paste0("D_main ~ ", paste(iv_keep2, collapse = "+"),
                                " + factor(region) + factor(t_id)")), data = Qb)
    jf2 <- wald_F(fs2, iv_keep2)
    Qb$D_main_hat <- fitted(fs2)


    rhs_ctrl <- if (!all(is.na(Qb$U_non))) " + U_non" else ""
    ss2 <- lm(as.formula(paste0("U_ba22 ~ D_main_hat", rhs_ctrl,
                                " + factor(region) + factor(t_id)")), data = Qb)

    Out2$header <- data.frame(
      model = "Main BA 2SLS + non-BA control",
      n = nobs(ss2), KP_F = jf2$F, KP_p = jf2$p
    )
    Out2$coef <- bind_rows(
      tidy_one(ss2, "D_main_hat", "Effect of demand (2SLS)"),
      if (!all(is.na(Qb$U_non))) tidy_one(ss2, "U_non", "Control: non-BA U") else NULL
    )
  }
}







Out3 <- list(
  header = data.frame(model = "Placebo (instrument): BA Bartik â†’ non-BA U (RF)",
                      n = NA, Joint_Wald_F = NA, Joint_p = NA)
)

if (!is.na(col_U_non) && !is.na(col_NB_btk)) {
  Qr <- Q0 %>%
    filter(is.finite(U_non)) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(finite_lags(., c("B1","B2","B3","B4"))),
                  ~ is.finite(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x)))))

  iv_keep3 <- finite_lags(Qr, c("B1","B2","B3","B4"))

  if (length(iv_keep3) >= 1 && nrow(Qr) > 0) {
    rf <- lm(as.formula(paste0("U_non ~ ", paste(iv_keep3, collapse = "+"),
                               " + factor(region) + factor(t_id)")), data = Qr)
    jf3 <- wald_F(rf, iv_keep3)


    sm <- summary(rf)$coef
    rows <- iv_keep3[iv_keep3 %in% rownames(sm)]
    per <- data.frame(
      term = rows,
      estimate = sm[rows,1],
      std.error = sm[rows,2],
      t = sm[rows,3],
      p = sm[rows,4],
      row.names = NULL
    )

    Out3$header <- data.frame(model = "Placebo (instrument): BA Bartik â†’ non-BA U (RF)",
                              n = nobs(rf), Joint_Wald_F = jf3$F, Joint_p = jf3$p)
    Out3$perlag <- per
  }
}







Out4 <- list(
  header = data.frame(model = "Placebo (outcome): BA 28â€“35 (2SLS via BA Bartik lags)",
                      n = NA, KP_F = NA, KP_p = NA)
)

if (!is.na(col_U_ba28) && !is.na(col_D_main)) {
  Qp <- Q0 %>%
    filter(is.finite(D_main), is.finite(U_ba28)) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(finite_lags(., c("B1","B2","B3","B4"))),
                  ~ is.finite(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x)))))

  iv_keep4 <- finite_lags(Qp, c("B1","B2","B3","B4"))

  if (length(iv_keep4) >= 1 && nrow(Qp) > 0) {
    fs4 <- lm(as.formula(paste0("D_main ~ ", paste(iv_keep4, collapse = "+"),
                                " + factor(region) + factor(t_id)")), data = Qp)
    jf4 <- wald_F(fs4, iv_keep4)
    Qp$D_main_hat4 <- fitted(fs4)

    ss4 <- lm(U_ba28 ~ D_main_hat4 + factor(region) + factor(t_id), data = Qp)

    Out4$header <- data.frame(
      model = "Placebo (outcome): BA 28â€“35 (2SLS via BA Bartik lags)",
      n = nobs(ss4), KP_F = jf4$F, KP_p = jf4$p
    )
    Out4$coef <- tidy_one(ss4, "D_main_hat4", "Effect of demand on BA 28â€“35 (2SLS)")
  }
}



cat("\n=== (1) Alt demand 2SLS (entry) ===\n")
print(Out1$header, row.names = FALSE)
if (!is.null(Out1$coef)) print(Out1$coef, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n=== (2) Main BA 2SLS + non-BA control ===\n")
print(Out2$header, row.names = FALSE)
if (!is.null(Out2$coef)) print(Out2$coef, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n=== (3) Placebo (instrument): BA Bartik â†’ non-BA U (reduced form) ===\n")
print(Out3$header, row.names = FALSE)
if (!is.null(Out3$perlag)) {
  cat("Per-lag effects of BA Bartik on non-BA U:\n")
  print(Out3$perlag, row.names = FALSE)
}

cat("\n=== (4) Placebo (outcome): BA 28â€“35 via BA Bartik (2SLS) ===\n")
print(Out4$header, row.names = FALSE)
if (!is.null(Out4$coef)) print(Out4$coef, row.names = FALSE)
```
